results.name: STEP01
DATA DIVISION
results.preamble:
File: COSGN00C.cbl
Program: COSGN00C - CICS COBOL Program - Signon Screen for the CardDemo Application
Section: DATA DIVISION (lines 29-71)
results.summary: data_division DATA DIVISION in COSGN00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COSGN00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y....
results.content:
DATA DIVISION.
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                     WORKING STORAGE SECTION
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.

       01 WS-VARIABLES.
         05 WS-PGMNAME                 PIC X(08) VALUE 'COSGN00C'.
         05 WS-TRANID                  PIC X(04) VALUE 'CC00'.
         05 WS-MESSAGE                 PIC X(80) VALUE SPACES.
         05 WS-USRSEC-FILE             PIC X(08) VALUE 'USRSEC  '.
         05 WS-ERR-FLG                 PIC X(01) VALUE 'N'.
           88 ERR-FLG-ON                         VALUE 'Y'.
           88 ERR-FLG-OFF                        VALUE 'N'.
         05 WS-RESP-CD                 PIC S9(09) COMP VALUE ZEROS.
         05 WS-REAS-CD                 PIC S9(09) COMP VALUE ZEROS.
         05 WS-USER-ID                 PIC X(08).
         05 WS-USER-PWD                PIC X(08).

       COPY COCOM01Y.

       COPY COSGN00.

       COPY COTTL01Y.
       COPY CSDAT01Y.
       COPY CSMSG01Y.
       COPY CSUSR01Y.

       COPY DFHAID.
       COPY DFHBMSCA.
      *COPY DFHATTR.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                        LINKAGE SECTION
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
       LINKAGE SECTION.
       01  DFHCOMMAREA.
         05  LK-COMMAREA                           PIC X(01)
             OCCURS 1 TO 32767 TIMES DEPENDING ON EIBCALEN.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      PROCEDURE DIVISION
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: DATA DIVISION
results.preamble:
File: COADM01C.cbl
Program: COADM01C - CICS COBOL Program - Admin Menu for Admin users
Section: DATA DIVISION (lines 29-73)
results.summary: data_division DATA DIVISION in COADM01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COADM02Y, COADM01, COTTL01Y....
results.content:
DATA DIVISION.                                                           
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*        
      *                     WORKING STORAGE SECTION                             
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*        
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.                                                 
                                                                                
       01 WS-VARIABLES.                                                         
         05 WS-PGMNAME                 PIC X(08) VALUE 'COADM01C'.              
         05 WS-TRANID                  PIC X(04) VALUE 'CA00'.                  
         05 WS-MESSAGE                 PIC X(80) VALUE SPACES.                  
         05 WS-USRSEC-FILE             PIC X(08) VALUE 'USRSEC  '.              
         05 WS-ERR-FLG                 PIC X(01) VALUE 'N'.                     
           88 ERR-FLG-ON                         VALUE 'Y'.                     
           88 ERR-FLG-OFF                        VALUE 'N'.                     
         05 WS-RESP-CD                 PIC S9(09) COMP VALUE ZEROS.             
         05 WS-REAS-CD                 PIC S9(09) COMP VALUE ZEROS.             
         05 WS-OPTION-X                PIC X(02) JUST RIGHT.                    
         05 WS-OPTION                  PIC 9(02) VALUE 0.                       
         05 WS-IDX                     PIC S9(04) COMP VALUE ZEROS.             
         05 WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT           PIC X(40) VALUE SPACES.                  
                                                                                
       COPY COCOM01Y.                                                           
       COPY COADM02Y.                                                           
                                                                                
       COPY COADM01.                                                            
                                                                                
       COPY COTTL01Y.                                                           
       COPY CSDAT01Y.                                                           
       COPY CSMSG01Y.                                                           
       COPY CSUSR01Y.                                                           
                                                                                
       COPY DFHAID.                                                             
       COPY DFHBMSCA.                                                           
                                                                                
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*        
      *                        LINKAGE SECTION                                  
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*        
       LINKAGE SECTION.                                                         
       01  DFHCOMMAREA.                                                         
         05  LK-COMMAREA                           PIC X(01)                    
             OCCURS 1 TO 32767 TIMES DEPENDING ON EIBCALEN.                     
                                                                                
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*        
      *                       PROCEDURE DIVISION                                
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.content:

      * Layer:       Business logic                                   *         
      * Function:    List Credit Cards                                          
      *              a) All cards if no context passed and admin user           
      *              b) Only the ones associated with ACCT in COMMAREA          
      *                 if user is not admin

           COCRDLIC.

DEFINE PROGRAM(COACCT01) GROUP(CARDDEMO)
 DESCRIPTION(LIST CARDS)

        STATUS(ENABLED) CEDF(YES) DATALOCATION(ANY) EXECKEY(USER)
        CONCURRENCY(QUASIRENT) API(CICSAPI) DYNAMIC(NO) TRANSID(CDRA)
        EXECUTIONSET(FULLAPI) JVM(NO) DEFINETIME(23/03/23 15:10:46)
        CHANGETIME(23/03/23 15:10:46) CHANGEUSRID(GILBION)
        CHANGEAGENT(CSDBATCH) CHANGEAGREL(0730)
 DEFINE PROGRAM(CODATE01) GROUP(CARDDEMO)
 DESCRIPTION(LIST CARDS)
        RELOAD(NO) RESIDENT(NO) USAGE(NORMAL) USELPACOPY(NO)
        STATUS(ENABLED) CEDF(YES) DATALOCATION(ANY) EXECKEY(USER)
        CONCURRENCY(QUASIRENT) API(CICSAPI) DYNAMIC(NO) TRANSID(CDRD)
        EXECUTIONSET(FULLAPI) JVM(NO) DEFINETIME(23/03/23 15:10:46)
        CHANGETIME(23/03/23 15:10:46) CHANGEUSRID(GILBION)
        CHANGEAGENT(CSDBATCH) CHANGEAGREL(0730)

        RESTART(NO) SPURGE(YES) TPURGE(YES) DUMP(YES) TRACE(YES)
        CONFDATA(NO) OTSTIMEOUT(NO) ACTION(BACKOUT) WAIT(YES)

 DEFINE TRANSACTION(CDRD) GROUP(CARDDEMO)

        TASKDATALOC(ANY) TASKDATAKEY(USER) STORAGECLEAR(NO)
        RUNAWAY(SYSTEM) SHUTDOWN(DISABLED) ISOLATE(YES) DYNAMIC(NO)
        ROUTABLE(NO) PRIORITY(1) TRANCLASS(DFHTCL00) DTIMOUT(NO)
        RESTART(NO) SPURGE(YES) TPURGE(YES) DUMP(YES) TRACE(YES)
        CONFDATA(NO) OTSTIMEOUT(NO) ACTION(BACKOUT) WAIT(YES)
        WAITTIME(0,0,0) RESSEC(NO) CMDSEC(NO)
        DEFINETIME(23/03/23 15:10:46) CHANGETIME(23/03/23 15:10:46)
        CHANGEUSRID(GILBION) CHANGEAGENT(CSDBATCH) CHANGEAGREL(0730)
 DEFINE LIBRARY(CARDDLIB) GROUP(CARDDEMO)

results.name: 9500-TCATBALF-CLOSE
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN02C.cbl
Program: CBTRN02C - BATCH COBOL Program - Post the records from daily transaction file.
Paragraph: 9500-TCATBALF-CLOSE (lines 674-691)
References: COPY CVTRA06Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA01Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 9500-TCATBALF-CLOSE in CBTRN02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
9500-TCATBALF-CLOSE.                                                     
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           CLOSE TCATBAL-FILE                                                   
           IF  TCATBALF-STATUS  = '00'                                          
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR CLOSING TRANSACTION BALANCE FILE'                 
               MOVE TCATBALF-STATUS  TO IO-STATUS                               
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.

results.name: 9500-TRANFILE-CLOSE
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN01C.cbl
Program: CBTRN01C - BATCH COBOL Program - Post the records from daily transaction file.
Paragraph: 9500-TRANFILE-CLOSE (lines 451-468)
References: COPY CVTRA06Y, COPY CVCUS01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y
Calls: PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM, PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
results.summary: paragraph 9500-TRANFILE-CLOSE in CBTRN01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVCUS01Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT02Y.... invokes: PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM, PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
9500-TRANFILE-CLOSE.
           ADD 8 TO ZERO GIVING APPL-RESULT.
           CLOSE TRANSACT-FILE
           IF  TRANFILE-STATUS = '00'
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT
           END-IF
           IF  APPL-AOK
               CONTINUE
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'ERROR CLOSING TRANSACTION FILE'
               MOVE TRANFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS
               PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
               PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           EXIT.
